preamble: The transformation from the uvular nasal /ɴ/ to the velar nasal [ŋ] is a result of place assimilation. When the moraic nasal is followed by a velar sound, the point of articulation shifts forward to the velum.

examples.note: Moraic nasal (ん) before velars like /k, ɡ/.

sources: Vance, T. J. (2008). The Sounds of Japanese.
Ladefoged, P., & Maddieson, I. (1996). The Sounds of the World's Languages.
